cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Fairy is super-effective vs Dragon (2x). Fairy introduced in Gen 6.

cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Fairy is not very effective vs Fire (0.5x).

cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Fairy is not very effective vs Poison (0.5x).

cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Steel-type moves are super-effective against Fairy-type Pokemon (2x) in Gen 6. Note: 'Steel resists Fairy' means Fairy→Steel=0.5x (the reverse direction), NOT Steel→Fairy=0.5x.

cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Fairy is immune to Dragon-type moves (0x).

cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 type chart — ERRATA #11
cases.note: Poison is super-effective vs Fairy (2x).
Fairy is super-effective vs Fighting (2x) in Gen 6.
Fairy is not very effective vs Steel (0.5x) in Gen 6.
Water is super-effective vs Fire (2x) in Gen 6.
Dark is not very effective vs Fighting (0.5x) in Gen 6.
Ice is super-effective vs Dragon (2x) in Gen 6.
Fighting moves have no effect on Ghost-type Pokemon (0x) in Gen 6.
Ground moves have no effect on Flying-type Pokemon (0x) in Gen 6.

cases.description: Knock Off deals 1.5x damage when the target is holding an item (introduced in Gen 6 — ERRATA #25)
cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen6 — KnockOff boost ERRATA #25
cases.note: Knock Off 1.5x damage boost is Gen 6+. Gen 4-5 had base power 20 with no conditional boost.
Knock Off base power was raised to 65 in Gen 6 (was 20 in Gen 1-5).

cases.description: Parental Bond second hit deals 50% of the primary hit in Gen 6 (reduced to 25% in Gen 7 — ERRATA #12)
cases.note: Gen 6: second hit = 0.5x. Gen 7+: second hit = 0.25x (ERRATA #12).

cases.description: Gale Wings gives +1 priority to ALL Flying-type moves in Gen 6 with no HP condition (ERRATA #13)
cases.note: No HP restriction in Gen 6. The full-HP requirement was added in Gen 7 (ERRATA #13).

cases.description: Gen 6 has 18 types (17 prior types plus the new Fairy type)
cases.note: Fairy type was added in Gen 6, bringing the total to 18 types.

cases.description: Terrain effects (Electric/Psychic/Misty/Grassy) last 5 turns by default in Gen 6 (8 turns with Terrain Extender)
cases.note: Terrain was introduced in Gen 6 with 5-turn base duration.

cases.description: Ability-summoned weather lasts 5 turns in Gen 6 (8 with weather rock items), changed from Gen 5's permanent weather
cases.note: Gen 6 capped ability weather at 5 turns. Gen 5 had no duration limit (permanent). This affects Drizzle, Drought, Sand Stream, and Snow Warning.

cases.description: Consecutive Protect uses reduce success rate by 1/3 each use in Gen 6: 100%, 33.3%, 11.1%, 3.7%... (ERRATA #9)
cases.note: Gen 6 changed from Gen 5's halving to tripling reduction (ERRATA #9).
Moonblast (introduced Gen 6) is a Special Fairy move with base power 95.
Play Rough (introduced Gen 6) is a Physical Fairy move with base power 90.
Moonblast base power = 95 in Gen 6. Unchanged in later gens.
Dazzling Gleam (introduced Gen 6) base power = 80. Special Fairy move.

cases.source: Showdown data/moves.ts Gen6 — Thunderbolt power reduction ERRATA
cases.note: Thunderbolt reduced from 95 to 90 base power in Gen 6.

cases.source: Showdown data/moves.ts Gen6 — Flamethrower power reduction
cases.note: Flamethrower reduced from 95 to 90 base power in Gen 6.

cases.source: Showdown data/moves.ts Gen6 — Surf power reduction
cases.note: Surf reduced from 95 to 90 base power in Gen 6.

cases.source: Showdown data/moves.ts Gen6 — Fire Blast power reduction
cases.note: Fire Blast reduced from 120 to 110 base power in Gen 6.
Charizard is 4x weak to Rock (fire 2x, flying 2x). Stealth Rock deals 1/8 × 4 = 1/2 max HP.
Blastoise (Water) is neutral to Rock. Stealth Rock deals 1/8 max HP.
